name: Missing Default Case in Multiple Condition Expression
description: Code with multiple conditional branches (such as switch statements) lacks a default case to handle unanticipated input values. The absence of a fallback handler can lead to complex logic errors and cascading failures with security implications.
detection_pattern: A CONTROL[switch|conditional] node handles multiple discrete cases from an INGRESS or TRANSFORM source but lacks a CONTROL[default_case] branch, allowing unanticipated values to pass through without handling.
